This vehicle delivers a refined balance of performance, comfort, and advanced technology, designed for drivers who value both sophistication and everyday usability. From the moment you step inside, the cabin reflects a strong attention to detail, combining premium materials with thoughtful ergonomics to create a calm, upscale driving environment. The interior layout is intuitive and spacious, offering generous legroom for both front and rear passengers, along with flexible cargo space that adapts easily to daily errands or longer trips. On the road, the driving experience is smooth and composed. Power delivery is responsive without being intrusive, making acceleration confident whether merging onto the highway or navigating city traffic. The transmission shifts seamlessly, contributing to a quiet and relaxed ride. Suspension tuning prioritizes comfort while still maintaining stability and control, giving the vehicle a planted, secure feel across a variety of driving conditions. Technology is a strong highlight throughout. The infotainment system is designed to be user-friendly, with a clear display and quick response times. Smartphone integration allows easy access to navigation, music, calls, and messaging, helping drivers stay connected without distraction. Voice controls and steering-wheel-mounted buttons further enhance convenience, keeping key functions within easy reach. Safety and driver-assistance features are integrated to support confidence behind the wheel. Systems such as blind-spot monitoring, lane-keeping assistance, rearview camera functionality, and adaptive cruise capabilities work together to enhance awareness and reduce fatigue on longer drives. These features are designed to assist rather than overwhelm, operating smoothly in the background to support the driver when needed. Comfort is emphasized throughout the cabin. Supportive seating provides excellent cushioning for extended drives, while multi-zone climate control helps ensure all occupants remain comfortable regardless of outside conditions. Noise insulation is well executed, minimizing road and wind noise to maintain a quiet, refined interior atmosphere. Storage compartments are thoughtfully placed, offering practical solutions for everyday items without cluttering the cabin. From an environmental and efficiency standpoint, the vehicle is engineered to balance performance with responsible fuel usage. Fuel economy ratings are competitive within its class, making it a practical option for both commuting and longer road trips. Detailed fuel-economy information and personalized estimates can be accessed through fueleconomy.gov using the provided QR code. Overall, this vehicle stands out as a well-rounded luxury option that blends advanced safety technology, modern connectivity, and premium comfort into a cohesive package. It is well suited for drivers seeking a polished, confident driving experience without sacrificing practicality or refinement. Whether used as a daily driver or for longer journeys, it delivers a sense of quality and composure that remains consistent mile after mile.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Navigation System,Equipment Group description: Discover the power and capability of this 2018 Ram 1500 Big Horn. With its commanding HEMI 5.7L V8 engine, 4-wheel drive, and impressive towing capacity, this truck is ready to take on any challenge.   Key features include:  Quick Order Package 26S Big Horn  Heated Seats & Wheel Group  Uconnect 4C with 8.4" display  Dual-zone automatic climate control  Remote start system  ParkSense front and rear park assist  Electroluminescent instrument cluster  Leather-wrapped steering wheel  Power-folding mirrors  LED bed lighting  This Big Horn model comes equipped with a wealth of premium amenities that elevate the driving experience. Enjoy the convenience of the Uconnect infotainment system with Apple CarPlay and Android Auto, as well as the added comfort of heated front seats and a heated steering wheel. The remote start feature allows you to warm up the cabin on chilly mornings, while the ParkSense system makes maneuvering in tight spaces a breeze.  The HEMI V8 engine under the hood delivers an exhilarating blend of power and efficiency, with 15 mpg in the city and 21 mpg on the highway. Paired with the smooth-shifting 8-speed automatic transmission, this powertrain provides the muscle to tow your toys or haul heavy loads with ease.  Exterior styling is bold and commanding, with a bright grille, chrome accents, and 20-inch aluminum wheels that give this Ram 1500 an undeniable presence on the road. The maximum steel metallic gray paint complements the rugged good looks, while the LED bed lighting ensures you can work or load up after the sun goes down.  Inside, the cabin is spacious and well-appointed, with premium cloth bucket seats, a full-length center console, and a 60/40 split-folding rear bench. The versatile layout and ample storage make this Ram 1500 an ideal companion for work or play.  Whether you're looking to upgrade your daily commute or need a capable partner for your next adventure, this 2018 Ram 1500 Big Horn is an exceptional choice. Experience the power, technology, and comfort that make this truck a standout in the full-size segment. Visit our showroom today to take it for a test drive and discover why the Ram 1500 is the right truck for you.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Big Horn Regional Package,Heated Seats & Wheel Group,Quick Order Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. description: 2018 BMW X5 sDrive35i  Blue exterior / Black interior  This exceptionally well-maintained 2018 BMW X5 sDrive35i combines BMWs potent 3.0L TwinPower Turbo inline-6 (300 hp, 300 lb-ft) with refined luxury and everyday practicality. With single-owner history, a clean CARFAX, excellent overall condition, and under 81,000 miles (averaging fewer than 9,000 miles per year), this X5 is ready to deliver years of confident driving. EPA fuel economy is approximately 18 MPG city and 25 MPG highway.  Factory-standard features and equipment (detailed) - Powertrain and driving dynamics   - 3.0L TwinPower Turbo inline-6 producing 300 hp and 300 lb-ft of torque   - sDrive rear-wheel drivetrain paired with an 8-speed automatic transmission with Sport and manual shift modes (Steptronic)   - BMW Driving Dynamics with selectable drive modes (Comfort, Sport, Eco Pro) to tailor throttle response, shift logic and steering feel   - Electronic Stability Control, Dynamic Traction Control and braking systems engineered for confident handling  - Exterior and convenience   - Striking Blue exterior paint matched with complementary body trim   - Power liftgate for easy cargo access   - Roof rails for flexible cargo carrying capability   - Automatic headlights and daytime running lights for improved visibility   - Rain-sensing windshield wipers and heated power side mirrors  - Interior comfort and seating   - Black interior with premium upholstery and refined trim finishes   - Power-adjustable front seats with memory function for the driver   - Dual-zone automatic climate control for individualized comfort   - Ample cargo area with split-folding rear seats to expand versatility  - Infotainment and connectivity   - BMW iDrive interface with a high-resolution display and central controller for intuitive operation   - Integrated navigation system (factory-installed mapping/navigation)   - Bluetooth hands-free calling and audio streaming, USB connectivity and auxiliary inputs   - HD Radio and satellite radio capability  - Safety and driver assistance   - Multi-stage front airbags, front seat side-impact airbags and full-length side curtain airbags   - Rearview camera and parking sensors to assist with maneuvering   - Tire pressure monitoring system and anti-lock braking system (ABS)  This X5 offers a well-balanced blend of performance, luxury and technology straight from the factory. The combination of low ownership turnover (one owner), a clean CARFAX, low average annual mileage, and excellent mechanical and cosmetic condition make this vehicle an attractive choice for buyers seeking a premium midsize SUV with strong performance and everyday usability. Contact us for a detailed equipment list specific to this vehicle and to schedule a test drive. description: Why BUY from Serra Chevrolet Sterling Heights?     When you choose this Corris Grey Metallic 2018 Jaguar F-TYPE 340HP with 96,000 miles, you are not just buying a used vehicle - you are investing in quality, reliability and peace of mind. Our clientele depend on us for Transparent Pricing, Convenience and, most importantly, Customer FIRST Service!     No Accidents!       What this vehicle includes:     Climate Package 1 ($1,380 value)Heated SeatsHeated Steering WheelHeated Windshield2-Zone Climate ControlPremium Leather Interior Package ($1,635 value)Windsor Leather Seating SurfacesWindsor Leather ConsolePremium Leather Door TrimWindsor Leather Wrapped Instrument Panel Topper          Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls.Safety and Security Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one.Technology and Telematics Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. The Explorer Limited's technology features are equally impressive, with the SYNC 3 Communications & Entertainment System, Sony Audio System, and a suite of advanced safety systems that provide peace of mind on every journey. The Multi-Contour Front Seats with Active Motion and the Heated and Ventilated front seats ensure you and your passengers arrive refreshed, no matter the length of the drive.  Versatility is the hallmark of the Explorer Limited, with a spacious and flexible interior that can accommodate your family, friends, and all their gear. The Power Liftgate and 60/40 split-folding rear seats make loading and unloading a breeze, while the 4WD system provides the confidence to tackle any terrain.  This meticulously maintained 2018 Ford Explorer Limited is a true gem, offering an unparalleled blend of style, comfort, and capability. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Rear collision mitigation - It has your back.  Rear collision mitigation uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it activates certain features to help prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it. Put your worries behind you with rear collision mitigation. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system. description: Own the road with professional-grade strength in this *Used 2018 GMC Sierra 1500 SLE*, now available at *Stuckey GMC in Altoona*. Combining bold styling with refined capability, the SLE trim is the sweet spot for Pennsylvania drivers who need a truck that works as hard as it plays. Whether you are hauling gear through the *Allegheny Mountains*, commuting to *State College*, or navigating the job sites of *Pittsburgh* and *Harrisburg*, this Sierra 1500 is engineered to exceed expectations.Located at *808 Logan Blvd, Altoona, PA 16602*, Stuckey GMC is proud to serve truck enthusiasts across *Blair*, *Centre*, *Allegheny*, *Huntingdon*, *Bedford*, *Cambria*, *Clearfield*, *Westmoreland*, and *Dauphin* counties.----------------------------------------==== Robust Performance and 4WD Capability ====The 2018 GMC Sierra 1500 SLE is built on a foundation of proven power, perfect for the diverse terrain of *Central Pennsylvania*:  *   *EcoTec3 Engine Options:* Powered by either the fuel-efficient 4.3L V6 or the legendary *5.3L V8*, providing the horsepower and torque necessary for towing and hauling in *Johnstown* and *Greensburg*.  *   *Intelligent 4WD:* The available four-wheel-drive system ensures you maintain traction and confidence during snowy winters in *Ebensburg* and *Bedford*.  *   *Trailering Excellence:* Equipped with a high-strength fully boxed steel frame and a maximum towing capacity of up to *9,400 lbs* (when properly equipped), it's ready for the boat, camper, or work trailer.  *   *Smooth Handling:* Features a coil-over-shock front suspension and multi-leaf rear springs to deliver a composed ride, whether the bed is empty or loaded for a trip to *Huntingdon*.==== SLE Trim: Refined Comfort and Smart Tech ====Inside, the Sierra SLE offers a premium cabin that doubles as a mobile office for drivers in *Tyrone* and *Harrisburg*:  *   *GMC Infotainment System:* Includes an *8-inch diagonal color touchscreen* with Bluetooth connectivity, voice commands, and available smartphone integration.  *   *Premium Materials:* Enjoy a leather-wrapped steering wheel and soft-touch dashboard materials that elevate the driving experience.  *   *Quiet Cabin Technology:* GMC's triple door seals and aerodynamic exterior mirrors help keep road noise out, providing a serene environment for your drive to *State College*.  *   *Versatile Utility:* Features the *EZ-Lift and Lower Tailgate*, making it easier to access the cargo bed when your hands are full at the job site or the campsite.==== Safety and Reliability You Can Trust ====Drive with peace of mind through *Dauphin* and *Clearfield* counties thanks to a suite of advanced safety features:  *   *StabiliTrak Stability Control:* Includes Proactive Roll Avoidance and Traction Control to keep you planted on winding PA backroads.  *   *Rear Vision Camera:* Provides a clear view of what's behind you, making hitching a trailer or parking in *Pittsburgh* effortless.  *   *High-Strength Safety Cage:* Engineered with ultra-high-strength steel to protect occupants in the event of an impact.  *   *Teen Driver Technology:* A standard feature that allows you to set parameters and review driving performance for younger family members.----------------------------------------==== Why Choose Stuckey GMC in Altoona? ====Stuckey GMC is the region's premier destination for high-quality used trucks. We are dedicated to providing:  *   *Stuckey's Super Benefits:* Experience the power of our *Super Price*, *Super Speed*, and *Super Value*. description: Tackle any job or adventure with this White 2018 Chevrolet Silverado 1500 LT Crew Cab 4x4 with a 6.5 ft. bed. Powered by a robust EcoTec3 5.3L V8 engine paired with a 6-speed automatic transmission, this Silverado delivers strong performance and towing capability. The All Star Edition and LT Plus Package bring premium features like heated front seats, remote vehicle start, power locking tailgate, and integrated trailer brake controller. Stay connected with an 8-inch MyLink infotainment system, Bluetooth, SiriusXM, and built-in Wi-Fi hotspot. Enjoy enhanced visibility with LED cargo lighting, HID headlights, and a rearview camera. Safety is a priority, featuring rear park assist, multiple airbags, stability control, and a tire pressure monitoring system. Rugged 4x4 capability, aluminum alloy wheels, and a tow/haul mode make this Silverado a versatile partner for work or play. Clean, well-maintained, and ready for your next journey. description: 2018 Toyota Tacoma TRD Off-Road // 4x4 // Silver on Black // Taco Spec // Sold by Apex AutoSports  Apex AutoSports is proud to offer a Tacoma that checks every box Taco owners actually care about. Yes  Taco owners. If you know, you know. These trucks have a cult following for a reason, and this one is dialed in exactly the way they like them.  Finished in Silver over Black cloth, this Tacoma TRD Off-Road came to us directly from our sister store AutoPark Dallas, and we had the opportunity to meet the previous owner  a true Taco guy who clearly did things the right way. You can tell this truck was loved, upgraded thoughtfully, and never abused.  Visually, this Tacoma looks tough. This 2018 Chevrolet Trax LS pairs a peppy Ecotec 1.4L Turbo I4 (138 hp, 148 lb-ft) with a smooth automatic transmission to deliver a responsive urban commuter and practical small crossover. EPA-estimated fuel economy of 24 MPG city and 30 MPG highway, combined with below 72,000 miles (averaging under 8,000 miles per year), makes this Trax an economical choice for daily driving and longer trips.  Factory-standard features and equipment: - Powertrain and chassis: Ecotec 1.4L turbocharged I4 engine with a calibrated automatic transmission for efficient acceleration and highway cruising. EPA fuel-economy ratings of 24 city / 30 highway. - Exterior: Compact crossover body with practical roofline, full lighting package, and factory 16-inch wheels (standard size on LS), designed for everyday durability and ease of parking. - Interior and comfort: Comfortable cloth seating, manual air conditioning, tilt-adjustable steering column, and ample cabin storage. Rear 60/40 split-folding seat folds flat to expand cargo capacity for gear or hauling needs. - Convenience: Remote keyless entry, power windows and door locks, and manually adjustable outside mirrors provide everyday convenience and usability. - Infotainment and connectivity: Chevrolet MyLink factory infotainment system with a color display, Bluetooth hands-free calling and audio streaming, and USB/AUX connectivity for smartphone integration and media playback. Child-seat LATCH anchors are included for family safety. - Built-in telematics: Factory OnStar compatibility for available emergency and assistance services (trial period typically included from new), enhancing peace of mind on the road.  Condition and history: - Excellent overall condition inside and out, reflecting careful ownership and regular maintenance. - Clean CARFAX report with no major incidents reported. - Low annual mileage history  under 8,000 miles per year  contributes to long-term value and reliability. description: Meet a clean, well-maintained 2019 Kia Optima LX in Snow White Pearl with a sleek Black interior  an excellent-condition midsize sedan that blends everyday comfort, smart tech, and efficient performance. Its economical, toorated at 24 MPG city and 33 MPG highwaymaking it a great choice for commuters and weekend drivers alike.  Factory-standard features youll appreciate: - Safety essentials: multi-stage front airbags, front-seat side airbags, full-length curtain airbags, anti-lock brakes (ABS), electronic stability control and traction control, brake assist, and tire pressure monitoring system. description: Meet the 2019 Jeep Renegade Latitude  small SUV, big attitude. Dressed in sleek Black Clear Coat with a Black/Ski Grey interior, this little box of fun packs the Tigershark 2.4L I4 under the hood, serving up 180 hp and 175 lb-ft of torque through a smooth 9-speed automatic. Translation: peppy city scoots, confident highway cruising, and an EPA-friendly 22 MPG city / 30 MPG highway to keep your wallet smiling.  Factory features (yes, the good stuff that comes standard): - Powertrain & drivetrain: Tigershark 2.4L I4 with a 9-speed automatic transmission  refined, responsive, and tuned for everyday driving. Front-wheel drive is standard with available 4x4 systems if youre feeling adventurous. - Infotainment: Uconnect 7.0 touchscreen infotainment system with smartphone-friendly Apple CarPlay and Android Auto  so your music, maps, and messages are where you want them without digging through menus. Bluetooth streaming audio, a USB port, and a 6-speaker audio system round out the essentials. - Convenience & comfort: Comfortable Black/Ski Grey cloth seats, supportive front buckets, and a 60/40 split-folding rear seat for cargo flexibility. Power windows and power door locks, remote keyless entry, air conditioning, cruise control, and a tilt/telescoping steering wheel for dialing in the perfect driver position. - Exterior details: Glossy Black Clear Coat paint that refuses to hide a little personality, body-color mirrors and bumpers for a clean, cohesive look, roof rails for weekend gear, and alloy wheels that balance style with durability. - Safety & driver aids: ParkView rear backup camera for painless parking, anti-lock brakes (ABS), electronic stability control and traction control to keep you composed in sketchy conditions, full-length side curtain airbags plus front and side airbags for protection, and tire pressure monitoring as standard. LATCH anchors make securing child seats straightforward. - Practical touches: Rear cargo floor with handy storage flexibility, easy-fold rear seats to expand hauling capacity, and durable interior materials that shrug off daily life (spilled coffee included  maybe).  In short: the Latitude is the practical-but-sassy choice  stylish outside, sensible inside, and ready to keep life moving without making you sacrifice fun. Want it in your driveway? Come see how nicely Black Clear Coat and Black/Ski Grey get along in person.[!@@Additional Info@@!]Air filtration, Front air conditioning: automatic climate control, Front air conditioning zones: This 2019 Chevrolet Tahoe LT is a stunning SUV with a long list of premium features that will elevate your driving experience. Paired with a smooth-shifting automatic transmission, this powerful V8 offers confident performance whether you're hauling cargo, towing trailers, or cruising on the highway. The Flex Fuel capability adds versatility by allowing the engine to run on E85 ethanol for flexible fueling options.Inside, the Lariat trim elevates your driving experience with premium materials, thoughtful design, and advanced comfort features. The SuperCrew Cab provides generous seating space for passengers in both front and rear rows, while supportive seats and intuitive controls make every drive  whether short errands or long road trips  relaxed and enjoyable. Quality finishes and smart storage solutions further enhance daily usability.Technology and convenience are integrated to keep you connected and entertained on the road. Additional comfort features like dual-zone climate control, power accessories, and advanced driver-assist systems help provide confidence and convenience in every situation.The 2019 Ford F-150 SuperCrew Cab Lariat delivers a powerful blend of capability, comfort, and everyday practicality, making it an excellent choice for drivers who want a well-equipped and dependable full-size pickup. description: Get ready to elevate your driving experience with the 2020 Chevrolet Tahoe LT, a robust SUV that perfectly blends power, comfort, and versatility. With its striking Black exterior and sleek Jet Black interior, this Tahoe is not only built for adventure but also designed to impress wherever you go. This unit is a used vehicle but maintains a clean title, showing that it has undergone stringent checks and balances, ensuring you drive off not only in style but with peace of mind. With 104,159 miles on the odometer, this Tahoe has averaged just about 34,720 miles per year, which is below the national average for vehicles of this type, showcasing its potential for more road trips and family adventures ahead.. Under the hood lies the 5.3L EcoTec3 V8 engine equipped with Active Fuel Management. This powerhouse not only provides strong performance but also integrates Direct Injection and Variable Valve Timing to deliver an impressive 355 horsepower and 383 lb-ft of torque. Experience acceleration like never before as you confidently hit the road, knowing that this SUV has been engineered with both performance and efficiency in mindwith an estimated fuel economy of 15 MPG in the city and a remarkable 21 MPG on the highway. description: he first of a limited run of 15 examples of the Pikes Peak Continental GT by Mulliner has been built at Bentleys carbon neutral factory in Crewe,  Limited Edition model features exclusive Radium by Mulliner paintwork, carbon fibre body kit, Acid Green brake disc callipers, and Pirelli P Zero Colour Edition Tyres. 35 per cent of allocated vehicles also include the optional mountain decal, the same as the record holding vehicle. Detailing on the interior consists of an Alcantara interior complemented by distinctive Radium contrast stitching and accents, carbon fibre fascias and waistrails including a Pikes Peak Overlay on the passenger fascia, and exclusive B&O speaker covers in Black Anodised and Radium  new Limited Edition is distinguished by a carbon fibre body kit and eye-catching Radium by Mulliner paintwork, mirroring the colour scheme used on the record-breaking car. Gloss black detailing has also been added to the front lower bumper inserts, roof panel, wing mirrors and rear surfaces. Over a third of the vehicles allocated, include the optional mountain decal to match the record holding  Green brake disc callipers, Pirelli P Zero Colour Edition tyres in Radium Finish and a Pikes Peak decal to the front fender hint at the Limited Editions record-breaking lineage, while 22-inch Mulliner Driving Specification wheels in Gloss Black are standard. An optional 100 grille is a reminder that the Continental GTs impressive hill climb achievement took place in Bentleys centenary  the cabin, Alcantara with contrasting Radium thread stitching adorns much of the soft trim areas, matched with Beluga hide. The steering wheel features a honeycomb stitching design and a centre stripe both in Radium, as per the Pikes Peak GT race car. Carbon fibre fascias and waistrails are complemented by a Piano Black centre console, all adding to the sporting theme. The passenger-side fascia features a graphic showing a section of the Pikes Peak track, with five different graphics being used across the 15-car run, along with the record-setting time of 10: Peak embroidery to the seat headrests in Radium stitching, Radium contrast binding on the overmats, Pikes Peak treadplates and exclusive B&O speaker covers in Black Anodised and Radium finish further enhance the interior appeal. The Continental GTs luxurious cabin includes the ground-breaking Bentley Rotating Display, deep pile overmats and Front Seat Comfort  the Continental GT that broke the Pikes Peak record last year, this new model features the worlds most advanced 12-cylinder petrol engine in the twin-turbocharged Bentley W12. This mighty engine develops 626 bhp and 900 Nm of torque, effortlessly accelerating the Continental GT from 0-100 km/h in 3.7 seconds (0-60 mph in 3.6 seconds), with a top speed of 333 km/h (207 mph).All prices are plus tax, title, licensing and a $200 negotiable documentary service fee. Vehicles are subject to availability.

Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control.In-car Entertainment Touchscreen - flat out convenient. Say goodbye to the twists and turns of your daily drive...we're talking about buttons and knobs of course! Touchscreen allows you to control certain features with your fingertips, making it easy to use while also providing information at a glance. With touchscreen, your fingerprints will be all over your drive.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back! Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. description: LWB!  Reaquired by Range Rover.  Inspected by Range Rover and then additionally by our Range Rover Certified Technicians, providing piece of mind.  Balance of factory warranty 5 Years from new/50,000 Miles and/or Additional 1 Year/12,000 Miles Range Rover Warranty.  Recent Arrival! 24-Way Htd & Cooled Massage Elec Fr Bucket Seats, Illuminated Seat Belt Buckles, Navigation system: Pivi Pro Connected Navigation, Park Assist, Pixel LED Headlights w/Signature DRL, Power moonroof, Premium Interior Protection & Storage Pack (RR0L1), Shadow Exterior Pack, Wheels: 23" Gloss Black (Style 1075). 2023 Land Rover Range Rover SE LWB Santorini Black Metallic. This 2023 Range Rover SE Long Wheelbase (LWB) is a masterclass in understated elegance, finished in timeless Santorini Black Metallic paint. With 30,509 miles, this example features the Shadow Exterior Pack, which replaces traditional chrome with sophisticated dark accents, perfectly complementing the massive 23-inch Gloss Black wheels. The extended wheelbase provides an imposing profile and significantly increased interior volume, ensuring a majestic presence on the road. Performance This LWB SE is typically powered by a potent 4.4L Twin-Turbo V8 engine (P530), delivering 523 horsepower and 553 lb-ft of torque. This powertrain allows the substantial SUV to accelerate from 0-60 mph in approximately 4.4 seconds. The vehicle is equipped with standard All-Wheel Steering, which grants it a remarkably tight turning radius for its size, and Electronic Air Suspension with Dynamic Response Pro to maintain a level, composed ride over any terrain. Design The exterior is defined by the sleek, reductive design language of the latest Range Rover generation, enhanced here by the Shadow Exterior Pack and Pixel LED headlamps with signature Daytime Running Lights. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of Caraway Semi-aniline leather, a premium grade of hide that offers a softer, more natural feel than standard leather. The vast interior is bathed in light from the sliding panoramic roof, emphasizing the clean lines and high-quality materials used throughout. Technology The dashboard is anchored by a 13.1-inch curved "floating glass" Pivi Pro infotainment system, featuring haptic feedback and wireless Apple CarPlay and Android Auto. Drivers benefit from a 13.7-inch Interactive Driver Display and an intuitive interface that handles over-the-air updates. The Pixel LED headlamps utilize advanced beam-shaping technology to maximize visibility while preventing glare for oncoming traffic, representing the cutting edge of automotive lighting. Advanced Safety Features Safety is paramount, with this model featuring Park Assist to help navigate the LWB chassis into tight spots with ease. It comes standard with a 3D Surround Camera system, Blind Spot Assist, and Lane Keep Assist. The suite of driver aids also includes Emergency Braking, Traffic Sign Recognition, and an Adaptive Speed Limiter, ensuring a secure environment for all seven passengers. Convenience and Comfort Luxury is elevated by the 24-way heated, cooled, and massage front seats, providing bespoke comfort for long journeys. The long wheelbase configuration ensures expansive legroom in the rear, where passengers enjoy their own heated and cooled seats. Four-zone climate control, a premium Meridian sound system, and a power-operated tailgate add layers of convenience that make every trip effortless and refined. Here at Jaguar Land Rover Schaumburg, we appreciate the opportunity to earn your business. This begins by being 100% committed to putting our customers first and offering complete transparency with every transaction. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life. Key Features Seating: Seats up to 7 with standard second-row bucket seats or optional second-row bench, plus available power-folding third-row. Interior Space: Extended wheelbase for more passenger/cargo room; 17.2 cu. ft. behind 3rd row, up to 84.6 cu. ft. with seats folded. Technology: Uconnect 5 infotainment system, available 10.1-inch touchscreen, six USB ports (A/C) in three rows, standard dual-zone climate control. Altitude Package Styling: Blacked-out exterior accents (grille, roof, wheels) for a distinct look. Performance: Standard 3.6L Pentastar V6 engine, available 4x4 system, 6,200 lb towing capacity. Comfort: Available heated steering wheel, leatherette seats, manual rear seat easy entry.  Benefits Family Versatility: Easily converts from passenger hauler to cargo carrier with folding seats and ample space for gear. Enhanced Comfort: Best-in-class second-row legroom and available Quad-Zone Climate Control keep everyone comfortable. Connected Experience: Multiple USB ports and user-friendly touchscreen keep devices charged and infotainment accessible. Premium Capability: Combines Jeep's legendary off-road heritage (with available 4x4) with luxury and modern tech. Value: The Altitude trim offers significant style and features without reaching the top-tier luxury trims, like the Summit. description: Thank you for choosing Kalidy Kia, this Winter White 2021 Hyundai Tucson Sport is a great choice! Check out the following:  No Accidents!  One Owner!   City 22/ Hwy 28     Option Group 01 OPTION GROUP 01, BEIGE, YES ESSENTIALS STAIN-RESISTANT CLOTH SEAT TRIM, REAR BUMPER APPLIQUE, MUDGUARDS, CARPETED FLOOR MATS, CARGO NET, REVERSIBLE CARGO TRAY, CARGO COVER  Comfort Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seat cushions provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower body pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seat cushions. Heated driver and front passenger seatbacks - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seatbacks provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower back pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seatbacks. Heated driver and front passenger seatbacks - That's hot. Heated driver and front passenger seatbacks provide more targeted warmth so you can get comfortable quicker in cold weather. If you have lower back pain, you might also be soothed by the heat while you drive. No matter the weather, find comfort in heated driver and front passenger seatbacks. Automatic air conditioning - Constantly fiddling with the A-C controls to maintain the cabin temperature is frustrating and distracting. Automatic air conditioning takes care of it for you by automatically adjusting the thermostat and fan settings as needed to maintain the temperature you select.  Keep your cool, with automatic air conditioning.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Power open and close liftgate - On-demand access. When your arms are full of cargo, the last thing you want to do is set it all down just to open the liftgate, then pick it all back up to load it in. By remotely opening and closing, power liftgate lets you skip straight to the loading. It also eliminates the awkward stretch to reach up for the liftgate to close it. Load and go with power open and close liftgate. Proximity key with keyless entry and push button start - Now close counts in horseshoes and car handles.  You know you have your keys on you, but where exactly you're not sure.  There's no need to dig around for them.  Thanks to Proximity key with keyless entry and push button start you can get in and get going, all with your keys safe and sound - wherever that is... Keyfob activated door locks (all doors) - all for one! With keyfob activated door locks on all doors, getting everyone in to get going has never been easier. Now, no one has to wait for you to get in to unlock their door. And once you've arrived, secure your vehicle as you walk away with a touch of a button. Keyfob activated door locks for all doors is a key part of convenience. Front inductive mobile device charging - No strings attached! Trying to plug in your mobile device while your driving is at best a hassle, and at worst, distracting and dangerous. Now all you have to do to charge it up is put it down. Simply placing your device on the charger activates the wireless process. Front inductive mobile device charging makes it that much easier to get powered up and stay connected. Smart device engine start control - Phone ahead.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from your smart device, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Smart device engine start control. Proximity cargo area access remote release - Hands free for when your hands are full.  No more awkward balancing of one thing on your hip while you hold another with your teeth to fish out your keys. The cargo area access opens by proximity to your key fob, so all you have to do is be there.  It's so convenient, you'd give Proximity cargo area access remote release a round of applause...if your hands were free.In-car Entertainment External memory control - Digital access anywhere. Your media of choice doesn't have to stay behind just because you're going somewhere.  Now, music and media from your hard-drive, devices or memory stick are easy to access and control from your vehicle, thanks to the external memory control.Safety and Security Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. Forward collision mitigation - Forward thinking. You look away for just a second and suddenly the vehicle in front of you has stopped. That's when the forward collision mitigation system comes to life.  When it senses an impending impact, it will activate a combination of features to help prevent or reduce the severity of an accident.  Forward collision mitigation is always looking ahead. Driver Attention Alert - Snap To it. Sometimes the drive is boring, sometimes you're tired, sometimes your mind starts to drift. Driver attention alert uses sensors to monitor the vehicle and/or driver's behavior and will flash or sound a warning to help keep you focused on the road ahead. Driver Attention Alert helps ensure your car doesn't drift when you do. Rear collision warning - It has your back.  This system uses sensors to monitor the area behind you.  If it senses an impending crash, it alerts you so you can take steps to prevent a collision or reduce the severity of it.  Rear collision warning, a second set off eyes watching over you. Lane departure prevention - Keep it between the lines. It only takes a moment of inattention for your vehicle to drift.  With lane departure prevention, your vehicle takes corrective action to help you avoid unintentionally moving out of your lane.  Lane departure prevention is an extra level of safety for you and those around you. Blind spot warning - Protect your blind side. You checked the mirror, looked over your shoulder and still nearly collided with the car next to you. Blind spot warning alerts you to the presence of a vehicle to your sides or rear so you know if you're about to make an unsafe lane change.  Replace fear and uncertainty with confidence and safety with blind spot warning. Hill hold control - Don't go back. You know the feeling - you're stopped on a hill and you're worried about your vehicle rolling backwards when you release the brakes. This is even more worrisome when you're towing. With hill hold control, the vehicle automatically applies brake force to prevent itself from rolling back. So whether you're towing a heavy load or simply stopped on a steep incline, hill hold control keeps you on the up and up. Tracker system with vehicle slowdown - Lost and found.  The built-in tracker system with vehicle slowdown can pinpoint your vehicle's location.  Have peace of mind knowing your vehicle is where it's supposed to be ... or if it isn't.  If your vehicle has been stolen, the slowdown feature allows police to bring it to a controlled stop remotely.  The tracker system with vehicle slowdown is on the mark for reassurance. Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Electronic stability control - Helping you stay grounded. By monitoring and comparing vehicle dynamics to driver input, this system acts instantly to help control the vehicle if it loses traction. Simulated suede/leather front seat upholstery is an inexpensive way to get the luxury look. Power reclining driver seat - Lean back. Gain some space between you and the wheel with power reclining driver seat. It lets you adjust the angle of the seatback at the touch of a button for added comfort while you're driving, or for a more comfortable rest while you're pulled over. Settle in, with power reclining driver seat. Power reclining driver seat - Lean back. Gain some space between you and the wheel with power reclining driver seat. It lets you adjust the angle of the seatback at the touch of a button for added comfort while you're driving, or for a more comfortable rest while you're pulled over. Settle in, with power reclining driver seat.Convenience Cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Set it and forget it. Road trips used to be stressful, until cruise control set the pace. Simply set the desired speed using the steering wheel mounted controls and it will maintain that speed without driver intervention. This can help minimize driver fatigue and improve overall fuel economy. Resting your right foot is right at your fingertips thanks to cruise control with steering wheel mounted controls. Keyfob engine start control - Get an early start.  Remotely start your vehicle's engine from the key fob, ensuring your ride is ready to go when you get in. Now you can stay comfortable inside while your vehicle gets comfortable outside, thanks to Keyfob engine start control. Proximity key with keyless entry and push button start - Now close counts in horseshoes and car handles.  You know you have your keys on you, but where exactly you're not sure.  There's no need to dig around for them.  Thanks to Proximity key with keyless entry and push button start you can get in and get going, all with your keys safe and sound - wherever that is... Proximity key with keyless entry and push button start - Now close counts in horseshoes and car handles.  You know you have your keys on you, but where exactly you're not sure.  There's no need to dig around for them.  Thanks to Proximity key with keyless entry and push button start you can get in and get going, all with your keys safe and sound - wherever that is...In-car Entertainment Touchscreen - flat out convenient. Say goodbye to the twists and turns of your daily drive...we're talking about buttons and knobs of course! Touchscreen allows you to control certain features with your fingertips, making it easy to use while also providing information at a glance. With touchscreen, your fingerprints will be all over your drive. Wireless audio streaming - Strike the cord.  With wireless streaming, the endless library of music on your mobile device is available through your vehicle's sound system!  Make a playlist befitting of your road trip as it rolls along;  let the back seat passengers control the selection;  catch up on your favorite podcasts.  With wireless audio streaming, all you have to do is press play. External memory control - Digital access anywhere. Your media of choice doesn't have to stay behind just because you're going somewhere.  Now, music and media from your hard-drive, devices or memory stick are easy to access and control from your vehicle, thanks to the external memory control. Internet radio - What's on the air isn't limited by your area.  Get the stations you want from anywhere with internet radio.  Whether it's your favorite station back home or a new station from the other side of the world, internet radio allows you to enjoy more music and programming options than you'd find on a typical AM/FM radio.Powertrain and Mechanical Variable valve timing - Change your output. There are a lot of variables in your drive, so why should your engine always operate the same?  With variable valve timing, the engine is efficient at both low and high RPM's, so you get better fuel efficiency, cleaner emissions and improved performance. Variable valve timing provides a better drive, every time. An OHV (pushrod) engine typically generates low-end torque sooner than an OHC engine of similar size. Peak torque is achieved at a lower RPM in OHV engines than in other designs, providing good acceleration from a stop. Smooth operator. An automatic transmission eliminates the need to shift gears for smoother, more efficient driving. Magnetorheological shocks - Iron out the road. These magnetic-fluid filled front shocks work in combination with sensors to react instantly to changing road conditions. The result is better performance and a smoother, safer ride. Take the surprises out of the road with magnetorheological shocks.Safety and Security Rear camera - Watching your back!  The rear camera helps you see obstacles and hazards you otherwise couldn't by showing enhanced images of what is behind you. The rear camera is an extra set of eyes that's both convenient and safe. Head-up display - Keep your head up! You don't have to take your eyes off of the road to get information from your dashboard anymore. With head-up display, important driving information - like speed and RPM's - displays on your windshield in your line of sight. Because when you're driving, the most important information lies on the road ahead. Keep your eyes on the road with head-up display. Brake assist - Stop right there.  Something jumps out into the middle of the road and you need to stop now!  With brake assist, you will.  It uses the speed of the brake pedal's travel to sense panic braking, then applies all available power to boost your stopping power. Brake assist can stop the accident before it is one. Restricted driving mode - Know their limits. Giving up your keys doesn't mean giving up control when you have restricted driving mode. You can set limits on things like music volume and speed to reduce your stress and worry when someone else is using the vehicle. Whether it's your teen-aged driver or a valet, you can help ensure they're driving safely with restricted driving mode. Ignition immobilizer - Theft is a non-starter.  You can feel more secure about your vehicle being there when you come back.  Ignition immobilizer is a passive security system consisting of a transmitter in the ignition key and a sensor located in the vehicle. If both are not present or do not recognize each other, the vehicle will not start.  Ignition immobilizer a sure-fire way to prevent the theft of your vehicle. Digital/analog instrumentation - A dashboard revolution - Get the nostalgia of traditional and the accuracy of the modern with digital/analog instrumentation. Combining analog style with digital gives you the best of both worlds. We love our technology, but there's nothing quite like burying the needle. That's why there's digital/analog instrumentation. Configurable gauges - Your ride, your view.  Configurable gauges allow you to choose the information you want to see, where you want to see it.  With a clear view of the information you need from the configurable gauges, you have one less thing on your mind.Technology and Telematics Smart device mirroring - Smartphone, meet smart car. You can control your device through your vehicle's infotainment system.  Smart device mirroring brings together safety and convenience by making it easier to find what you're looking for while keeping your eyes on the road. Mobile hotspot - WiFi on the fly. Connect your devices to the Internet through your vehicle's private mobile hotspot and take the internet wherever your journey takes you, without eating up your data allowance. Find the hotspot with mobile hotspot. Wireless connectivity - Strike the cord. Wireless technology makes it easy to place calls without having to fumble with your phone. It integrates your device with the system inside your vehicle for hands-free access. Keep connected and keep your hands on the wheel with wireless connectivity. description: Ledet's Auto Sales proudly services every vehicle before the sale to ensure customer satisfaction. All vehicles pass a specific multi-point inspection before it goes to our lot. We also offer a number of different warranties for our vehicles. Come by or call today to see what specials we are offering!  Experience the perfect blend of performance, sophistication, and efficiency with the stunning 2021 Volkswagen Passat SE! Dressed in a captivating shade of blue, this midsize sedan is more than just a carit's a statement of style and intelligent engineering. Whether you're commuting to work, heading out for a weekend getaway, or simply enjoying a leisurely drive, the Passat SE promises to elevate every journey.  Beneath its sleek, aerodynamic exterior lies a heart that beats with power and precision. The 2.0L Turbo I4 engine delivers a spirited 174 horsepower and a robust 206 ft. lbs. of torque, ensuring that you have all the power you need for any driving situation. Paired with a 6-Speed Shiftable Automatic transmission, this Passat offers seamless gear transitions and the flexibility to switch between automatic ease and manual control at your fingertips. This dynamic duo not only provides exhilarating performance but also maintains impressive fuel efficiency, making it a smart choice for both your wallet and the environment.  Step inside, and you'll be greeted by an interior that exudes luxury and comfort. The other leatherette seating offers a sophisticated look and feel, providing plush support and durability for both driver and passengers. Every detail of the cabin has been thoughtfully designed to enhance your driving experience, from the intuitive layout of controls to the ample legroom and headroom that ensure comfort on even the longest drives.  When it comes to peace of mind, the 2021 Volkswagen Passat SE is a winner. It's no surprise that this vehicle has been recognized by Kelley Blue Book with the prestigious 5-Year Cost to Own: Best Cars award, not once, but twice! This accolade speaks volumes about the Passat's exceptional value, reliability, and low ownership costs, making it a wise investment for savvy buyers who want to enjoy luxury without breaking the bank.  The Passat SE is not just about performance and comfort; it also boasts a suite of advanced features designed to keep you connected and entertained. With its state-of-the-art infotainment system, you'll have access to your favorite music, navigation, and hands-free calling, all at the touch of a button. The vehicle's user-friendly interface ensures that you stay focused on the road while enjoying all the conveniences modern technology has to offer.  Safety is a top priority, and the Passat SE doesn't disappoint. It comes equipped with a range of safety features designed to protect you and your passengers, providing confidence and peace of mind on every drive. From its robust construction to its advanced driver-assist technologies, this vehicle is engineered to keep you safe and secure, mile after mile.  In summary, the 2021 Volkswagen Passat SE is a remarkable vehicle that combines striking aesthetics, powerful performance, and exceptional value. Its award-winning credentials and thoughtful design make it a standout choice for anyone in the market for a reliable, luxurious, and cost-effective sedan. Don't miss your chance to own this incredible vehiclevisit us today and take the Passat SE for a test drive. Experience firsthand why it's the perfect car for you!
